flashcards.definition: The process of setting goals, assessing resources, and creating strategies to achieve financial objectives.
The expected time period until a financial goal is needed; determines risk tolerance and investment choices.
Total assets minus total liabilities; the comprehensive measure of financial health.
Key target on the path to a larger goal (e.g., paying off credit cards before attacking student loans).
What you give up when choosing one option over another (e.g., spending now vs. investing for later).
